evals.prompt: 推荐几款15万左右的新能源SUV，主要家用，空间要大，我在无锡
evals.expected_output: 2-3 款推荐车型，含落地价对比表格，核心优势/缺点清晰
assertions: Output contains at least 2 recommended models
Output mentions model pros and cons
Output includes an estimated on-road price

evals.prompt: 比亚迪海豹EV和特斯拉Model 3怎么选？主要在乎省钱和保值
evals.expected_output: 从用车成本和保值率两个维度对比两车，给出建议
assertions: Recommends one model and explains why
Does not give absolute statements like 'xxx is definitely better'

evals.prompt: 纯电和混动选哪个？我在无锡没有家充条件
evals.expected_output: 分析纯电和混动的适用性，考虑无家充的实际情况
assertions: Considers the user's lack of home charging
Estimates annual energy cost for both options
Does not assume user has home charging

evals.prompt: 特斯拉Model Y焕新版落地多少钱？一年养车要花多少？
evals.expected_output: 最新落地价 + 年度用车成本明细
assertions: Mentions higher insurance cost for NEV

evals.prompt: 10万预算想买辆二手新能源车，家庭第一辆车，主要代步
evals.expected_output: 预算内二手车型推荐 + 淘车注意事项
assertions: Discusses battery health as key factor
